title: Monday Music Mix #24
summary: This is getting a bit irregular, isn’t it? The last six weeks have been hellishly busy to say the least. I’ve heard plenty of great music, and it was hard to narrow it down to just seven tracks. Hopefully this will do.

tracks.title: Sa Sa Samoa (For Real For Sure For You Version)
tracks.displayText: Korallreven - Sa Sa Samoa (For Real For Sure For You Version)

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Twentyfourth

This is getting a bit irregular, isn’t it? The last six weeks have been hellishly busy to say the least. I’ve heard plenty of great music, and it was hard to narrow it down to just seven tracks. Hopefully this will do.

Without further ado.

Monday Music Mix: 24

Album art featuring splendid work by Sam Chivers

Tracklist:

  1. Korallreven - Sa Sa Samoa (For Real For Sure For You Version)
  2. Wild Flag - Romance
  3. Roxy Music - Avalon
  4. Black Marble - Pretender
  5. Bowerbirds - In the Yard
  6. AU - Solid Gold
  7. Grouplove - Tongue Tied

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

Send your love (if any) and feedback through the comments.
